description: Detects C# string-typed parameters, fields, and properties with names suggesting an enum (status, state, type, kind, role, mode, etc.). Simplified from Rust: flags all parameter nodes. Cannot filter by specific suspicious name list, string type check, DTO class exclusion, or compound name matching. Structural detection only.

flag.message: Parameter detected -- if string-typed with a name suggesting an enum (status, role, type, kind), consider using a strongly-typed enum instead.
